prompt: A surreal realistic scene where a single person stands in the center of a room with a few connections, while surrounding them are people who each have many more connections extending outward like a dense network. The central person appears isolated while others are highly connected, forming a visually uneven web structure. No text, no numbers, no symbols. Cinematic lighting, realistic human figures, subtle emotional contrast, no diagrams, no charts.
visual_logic: A central person appears less connected while others have dense outward connections, making it visually feel like everyone else is more connected, embodying the paradox.
